projects.title: ImageStudioLab
projects.description: AI-native design platform for high-end luxury brands and e-commerce. Scale your brand identity with high-fidelity visual generation and identity preservation.
projects.longDescription: ImageStudioLab is a professional, AI-native design platform engineered specifically for luxury brands and e-commerce teams. Powered by the proprietary 'Nano Banana 2' engine, it delivers high-fidelity visual generation with strict identity preservation. The platform streamlines marketing workflows with 'One Asset. Every Format' bulk exports, AI Reel templates for high-energy video montages, and specialized luxury brand grading to meet the highest aesthetic standards.
challenges: Building proprietary AI engine for brand identity preservation
Implementing high-fidelity rendering for luxury brand standards
Developing 'One Asset. Every Format' automated export workflow
Creating AI Reel templates for high-energy video montages
achievements: Developed an AI platform tailored for the luxury e-commerce market
Engineered 'Nano Banana 2' engine for superior visual consistency
Automated the creation of multi-format marketing campaigns
Integrated pixel-perfect sync and golden-ratio composition principles

projects.title: Link4Coders
projects.description: Developer-first bio platform built with Next.js. Create professional developer profiles with GitHub integration, interactive code snippets, project showcases, and skill matrices - all in one link.
projects.longDescription: Link4Coders is a comprehensive developer portfolio platform designed specifically for developers to showcase their work effectively. It features GitHub integration for repository management, interactive code snippets for skill demonstration, beautiful project cards with screenshots and tech stacks, skill matrices for proficiency visualization, and blog integration. The platform offers multiple professional templates including Minimalist Pro, Cyberpunk Terminal, and GitHub Focus themes. Built with a focus on developer experience, it provides seamless project showcasing and professional networking capabilities.

projects.title: KlickTape
projects.description: A modern mobile application built with React Native and Expo. Features cross-platform compatibility, real-time functionality, and seamless user experience across iOS and Android.
projects.longDescription: KlickTape is a comprehensive mobile application that leverages the power of React Native and Expo for cross-platform development. It includes advanced features like real-time updates, push notifications, and native device integrations.
achievements: Achieved smooth performance on both platforms

projects.title: AxomPrep
projects.description: Smartest AI Study Companion for SEBA and AHSEC board exams. Create personalized Pocket Coaches in native Assamese and English for 24/7 learning.
projects.longDescription: AxomPrep is an AI-driven educational platform designed to transform study habits for students in Assam. It features 'Pocket Coaches' that provide hands-free, real-time voice conversations natively in Assamese and English. Students can create specialized AI coaches for any subject, access smart knowledge quizzes, and listen to educational audio stories. The platform is deeply integrated with the SEBA and AHSEC board curriculum, offering instant doubt solving and personalized coaching optimized for the 2026 board exam cycle.
challenges: Implementing real-time AI voice synthesis in native Assamese
Building an adaptive knowledge quiz engine tailored to SEBA/AHSEC boards
Fine-tuning NLP models for regional language accuracy and context
Developing hands-free voice interaction for a 'Pocket Coach' experience
achievements: Launched the first AI-driven study companion for students in Assam
Successfully integrated native Assamese language support with Google Gemini
Developed a scalable 'Prep Pass' premium subscription model
Created a specialized audio story and podcast system for academic English

projects.title: Apromax
projects.description: A comprehensive business management platform with admin panel functionality, built using modern web technologies for efficient business operations and management.
projects.longDescription: Apromax is a robust business management solution that includes an admin panel for comprehensive business operations. It features user management, analytics dashboard, reporting tools, and various business automation features to streamline operations.
